scope: Ariana Vara (Princesa) Syvo storefront, one catalog row per (style, color).
notes: Detail-page scrape; no public JSON API.
image_urls stores the .2000.webp zoom URL per image. image_meta carries face/crop/sequence/is_default labels lifted from alt text on the previews strip.
color_hex, size_range, and attributes are captured but not consumed by the current importer; they wait for a future catalog_items schema change.
Public codes are null because the app mints them on import.
Pricing and per-size availability are intentionally skipped.

items.product_title: Curved Cracked Ice Gown w/ Jeweled Straps
items.description_text: Radiant and youthful, this curved quinceañera gown sparkles with cracked ice, intricate beading, and stone accents. It features a pocket, detachable off-the-shoulder straps adorned with jewels, a capelet, a necklace, detachable bow tails, and a back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Boned Bodice Quinceañera Gown w/ Extra-Long Train
items.description_text: Shine all night long in this gorgeous ballgown. Boning sculpts the bodice to perfection, while the extra-long train sweeps dramatically behind, enhanced by cracked ice, lace appliqués, an oversized back bow, and stone accents. It features pockets, detachable off-the-shoulder straps, a capelet, and a back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Unbelievable Train Gown w/ Semi-Sheer Bodice
items.description_text: Timeless and poised, this sweetheart quinceañera gown mesmerizes with an unbelievable train and semi-sheer bodice accented by cracked ice, tulle, metallic lace appliqué, beading, sequins, and stone details. It features a separate cloak, detachable off-the-shoulder straps, bow, capelet, and back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Cracked Ice Quinceañera Ball Gown w/ Oversized Back Bow
items.description_text: Cracked ice tulle swirls with lace appliqués and three-dimensional flowers, laced with beading and sequins. Detachable overskirt, straps, capelet, and beautiful oversized back bow unveil her majesty—her night forever blooming.

items.product_title: Oversized Bow Drama Gown w/ Glitter Tulle
items.description_text: This oversized bow is the drama! This sweetheart quinceañera gown commands the spotlight, featuring layers of glitter tulle, metallic lace appliqué, beading, sequins, and stone accents. It features pockets, detachable off-the-shoulder straps, bow tails, a brooch, a capelet, and a back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Quinceañera Ball Gown w/ Six Giant Bows
items.description_text: Beautiful bows adorn this sweetheart quinceañera ballgown from every angle, with six giant bows cascading dramatically down the back for unrivaled wow. Cracked ice, lace appliqués, beading, sequins, stone accents, and three-dimensional flowers add to the magic, featuring pockets, detachable off-the-shoulder straps, a bow cape, a train, and a back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Lace-Up Corset Gown w/ Oversized Bows
items.description_text: Lace-up corset detailing cinches the silhouette with romantic allure on this sweetheart quinceañera ballgown, crowned by oversized bows on the off-the-shoulder straps and back. Shimmering cracked ice, lace appliqués, beading, sequins, and stone accents elevate the drama, with detachable straps, capelet, and back modesty panel included.

items.product_title: Quinceañera Ball Gown w/ 3D Flowers
items.description_text: Three-dimensional organza flowers bloom dramatically at the skirt's base on this sweetheart quinceañera gown, set against cracked ice on glitter tulle, lace appliqués, beading, sequins, and stone accents. It features pockets, detachable back bow, jeweled shoulder straps, off-the-shoulder straps, capelet, and back modesty panel.

items.description_text: All-over glitter dot tulle sparkles endlessly on this ballgown, with an illusion sweetheart neckline and semi-sheer bodice cutouts adding alluring mystery. Enhanced by lace appliqués, beading, sequins, and stone accents, it features pockets, detachable off-the-shoulder straps, a bow, a capelet, and a back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Quinceañera Ball Gown w/ Flower Straps
items.description_text: Shine all night long in this gorgeous ballgown. Glitter dot tulle cascades over the skirt, while three-dimensional flowers bloom delicately on the off-the-shoulder straps—complemented by metallic lace appliqués, beading, sequins, and stone accents. It features a detachable train, off-the-shoulder straps, sleeve drape, bow, capelet, and back modesty panel.

items.product_title: Sweetheart Glitter Tulle Ball Gown w/ Detachable Bow & Necklace
items.description_text: Radiate charm in this off‑the‑shoulder ball gown dazzles with a sweetheart neckline framed by a sparkling necklace that catches every light. Beading, sequins, and lace appliqué shimmer across layers of glitter tulle and crinoline, creating a radiant, full silhouette. A dramatic detachable back bow and flowing capelet add a signature finish, while removable straps and a modesty panel offer a beautifully refined fit.

items.description_text: Radiate charm in this off‑the‑shoulder ball gown dazzles with a sweetheart neckline framed by a sparkling necklace that catches every light. Beading, sequins, and lace appliqué shimmer across layers of glitter tulle and crinoline, creating a radiant, full silhouette. A dramatic detachable back bow and flowing capelet add a signature finish, while removable straps and a modesty panel offer a beautifully refined fit.

A dramatic detachable back bow and flowing capelet add a signature finish, while removable straps and a modesty panel offer a beautifully refined fit.

items.product_title: Sweetheart Glitter Tulle Ball Gown w/ Bow & Pockets
items.description_text: Radiant and youthful, this sweetheart quinceañera gown shines with glitter tulle, lace appliqué, and sparkling bead and sequin accents. It features a detachable back bow with tails, a delicate capelet, hidden pockets, and a coordinating necklace.

items.product_title: Sweetheart Cracked Ice Ball Gown w/ Tiered Straps
items.description_text: This breathtaking ball gown shines in cracked ice fabric, its sweetheart neckline framed by three‑tier off‑the‑shoulder straps that shimmer with beading, sequins, and lace appliqué. Layers of crinoline create a regal silhouette accented by radiant stone details and a flowing capelet.

items.description_text: Delightfully whimsical, this strapless sweetheart ball gown dazzles with glitter tulle, cracked ice fabric, and lace appliqué accented by shimmering sequins and stone details. Three-dimensional butterflies and a detachable draped beaded bow overlay add enchanting dimension, complemented by a graceful capelet.

items.product_title: Stone Accent Off-the-Shoulder Ball Gown
items.description_text: Dazzle from every angle in this sparkling ball gown featuring a cracked ice overlay and intricate lace appliqués. The draped off-the-shoulder straps shimmer with radiant stone accents. The sweetheart neckline, corset-style bodice, and detachable bow add a regal finish to this unforgettable look!

items.product_title: Off-the-Shoulder 3D Floral Organza Ball Gown
items.description_text: A romance of structure and sparkle, this off‑the‑shoulder ball gown captivates with its sweetheart neckline and shimmering stone‑accented beading. Layers of organza and crinoline create a full, sculpted silhouette enhanced by detachable straps and a flowing capelet for a look that transforms effortlessly. Hidden pockets bring a modern, effortless detail to this enchanting design.
